DUE TO DEFECTIVE OWNERSHIP / DOUBLE EXEMPTION OF EXEMPTEE PLOT IS LIABLE TO BE CANCELLED. DLA REPORT IS BEING REPRODUCED AS UNDER:-
 
 As per available record and w.r.t mutation no. 7614 the claimant in instant file has purchased the land from MR. KALE KHAN S/O RANJHE KHAN who claimed to bought the said land from MR IQBAL UD DIN.
 MR IQBAL UD DIN was original awardee in khasra no. 2930, 3030 and 2934/3 after that several amendmants were made in award including the one in favor of MR SAEED AHMAD (claimant in instant file) from the name of MR KALE KAHN.
 These amendments were cancelled later on in light of collector order dated:13-05-1984 (based on court orders dated:19-03-1984) and award was restored in the names of heirs of MR IQBAL UD DIN.
 The mutation in favor of LDA has also been received from the name of heirs of MR IQBAL UD DIN.
 So the ownership of claimant in instant file is not verified.
 NO TRANSFER HAS BEEN DONE AFTER 1984 THEREFORE CASE FALLS IN THE AMBIT OF PRE-89 CATEGORY.
 
 LITIGATION TITLED MST. SARDAR BANO VS LDA ETC. IS PENDING IN THE COURT OF LAW. FINAL FATE OF LITIGATION IS NOT KNOWN. Objection conveyed
DISPOSAL OF COURT CASE TITLED MUHAMMAD WASEEM VS LDA IS REQUIRED
